text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"4","subject":"Create reusable widgets (Stage 4a)","description":"Create all reusable widget files for saju-flutter, porting from iOS Swift components:

1. `lib/widgets/card_background.dart` — CardBackground widget: Container with BoxDecoration(color: surfaceRaised, borderRadius: 16, border). Port from CardBackground.swift.

2. `lib/widgets/score_bar.dart` — ScoreBar: label + animated progress bar + value. Color by score (80+=green, 60+=amber, 40+=rose, else gray). Port from ScoreBar.swift.

3. `lib/widgets/section_header.dart` — SectionHeader: circle icon badge + title. Port from SectionHeader.swift.

4. `lib/widgets/form_card.dart` — FormCard: icon + title header with content child. Port from SajuInputView.swift's FormCard.

5. `lib/widgets/settings_card.dart` — SettingsCard + SettingRow. Port from ProfileView.swift.

6. `lib/widgets/quick_action_button.dart` — QuickActionButton: icon in rounded rect + label. Port from HomeView.swift.

7. `lib/widgets/four_pillars_card.dart` — FourPillarsCard with PillarColumn and PillarCell. 4-column grid showing stem/branch with hanja and element colors. Port from FourPillarsCard.swift.

8. `lib/widgets/five_elements_chart.dart` — FiveElementsChart with ElementBar. Animated bars showing element distribution. Port from FiveElementsChart.swift.

9. `lib/widgets/hero_banner.dart` — HeroBanner: purple gradient with birth info. Port from HeroBanner.swift.

10. `lib/widgets/compatibility_ring.dart` — CompatibilityRingView: CustomPainter animated ring with score. Port from CompatibilityRingView.swift.

11. `lib/widgets/chapter_card.dart` — ChapterCard + ClosingCard + ChapterInfo. Streaming cursor, skeleton loading. Port from ChapterCard.swift.

12. `lib/widgets/loading_error_views.dart` — LoadingView(message, emoji, glowColor) + ErrorView(message, onRetry). Common across all screens.

All iOS component source files are in /Users/kangnam/projects/saju/saju-ios/SajuForum/Components/. Read them for exact styling.","assignedBy":"stage4-widgets","timestamp":"2026-03-03T07:55:53.514Z"}
